name: Rattan Reversible Outdoor Planter Basket - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Showcase your favorite plants in this Rattan Reversible Planter Basket from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of rattan material, this planter basket boasts a woven texture that lends it a raw, organic vibe. This planter basket is designed in an hourglass shape and boasts a reversible design for use on both sides. Suitable for outdoor use, you can place it on the porch, beside the front door, or in other areas to show your love for plants.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
